problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to or, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
